technical_clubs.name: Coding Club / Programming Club
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Attend orientation at the beginning of semester. Fill membership form. Nominal fee of Rs. 100-300/year.
technical_clubs.benefits: Improves DSA skills, competitive programming profile, internship readiness

technical_clubs.name: Robotics Club
activities: Participation in Robocon, ROBOFEST, IIT Techfests
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Attend technical selection round or workshop
technical_clubs.benefits: Hardware skills, team collaboration, national competition exposure

technical_clubs.name: IEEE Student Branch
technical_clubs.eligibility: Open to all engineering students. Annual IEEE student membership fee applies.
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Register at ieee.org and join your college's IEEE student branch
technical_clubs.benefits: Access to IEEE digital library, networking with global engineers, professional development

technical_clubs.name: Web Development Club
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Semester registration drive; open-source project contribution

technical_clubs.name: AI/ML Club
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Basic Python knowledge required; attend introductory session

technical_clubs.name: Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell)
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Open to all students passionate about entrepreneurship
technical_clubs.benefits: Startup ecosystem exposure, networking with entrepreneurs and VCs, seed funding opportunities

technical_clubs.name: SAE Collegiate Club (for auto/mech)
activities: Formula Student / BAJA SAE car design
technical_clubs.eligibility: Mechanical, Aerospace, Automotive engineering students preferred

technical_clubs.name: Photography & Filmmaking Club
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Portfolio submission or open audition; interest in visual media

technical_clubs.name: Electronics Club / Hardware Club
technical_clubs.how_to_join: Interest in electronics; attend first session for orientation

cultural_clubs.name: Music Club
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Audition at the start of semester or during cultural fest registrations
cultural_clubs.events: Freshers party, annual cultural fest (Mood-I, Saarang, Culturals, Utsav — varies by college)

cultural_clubs.name: Dance Club
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Audition at semester start; some sub-groups have open practice sessions

cultural_clubs.name: Drama / Theatre Club
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Audition with a short performance; no prior experience required usually
cultural_clubs.benefits: Public speaking, confidence, storytelling, stage management skills

cultural_clubs.name: Fine Arts Club
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Portfolio or interest; workshops open to all

cultural_clubs.name: Literary Club / Quill Club
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Open to all; writing sample or interest declaration

cultural_clubs.name: Cultural Fest Committee
cultural_clubs.how_to_join: Open recruitment; roles include coordinator, volunteer, design team, media team, logistics
cultural_clubs.importance: Cultural fest is the biggest student-organized event; great leadership and management experience

sports_clubs.name: Cricket Team
sports_clubs.how_to_join: Trials at the start of academic year; conducted by physical education department

sports_clubs.name: Football Team
sports_clubs.how_to_join: Trials; register with physical education department

sports_clubs.name: Badminton Club
sports_clubs.how_to_join: Open for all; PE department registration

sports_clubs.name: Chess Club
sports_clubs.how_to_join: Open for all; basic chess knowledge helpful

sports_clubs.name: Athletics Club
activities: Track and field (100m, 200m, 400m, long jump, shot put)

social_service.name: NSS (National Service Scheme)
social_service.overview: NSS is a Central Government program for students to engage in community service. 240 hours of community work earns NSS certificate.
social_service.benefits: NSS certificate adds value to resume; extra marks in some university systems; personality development
social_service.how_to_join: Register at the beginning of academic year through NSS unit. Limited seats — early registration recommended.
social_service.annual_camp: 7-day special NSS camp in an adopted village; mandatory for certificate completion

social_service.name: NCC (National Cadet Corps)
social_service.overview: Para-military training program for college students. Three wings: Army, Navy, Air Force.
social_service.benefits: NCC C-Certificate holders get preference in government jobs, army entry, GD/leadership skills
social_service.how_to_join: Registration at beginning of year; physical fitness test and interview
social_service.certificate_levels: A Certificate (after 1st year), B Certificate (after 2nd year), C Certificate (after 3rd year) — C Certificate is most valued

social_service.name: Rotaract Club
social_service.overview: Youth wing of Rotary International. Focus on community service and leadership.
social_service.how_to_join: Contact Rotaract club president; annual membership fee of Rs. 500-1000

social_service.name: Red Cross Youth Wing
social_service.how_to_join: Register at beginning of year; orientation session

student_governance.name: Student Council / Student Union
student_governance.overview: Elected body representing student interests to college management. Organizes events, addresses grievances, manages student welfare.
student_governance.elections: Held annually at the start of academic year. Nomination → Campaigning → Voting → Results
student_governance.responsibilities: Represent students in college committees, organize events, manage student welfare fund, address academic and non-academic issues
student_governance.how_to_participate: Vote in elections as a student; contest elections if interested; become Class Representative (CR) for your batch

student_governance.name: Anti-Ragging Committee
student_governance.overview: Mandatory committee per UGC Regulation 2009 to prevent and punish ragging on campus.
student_governance.penalties: Expulsion, rustication, cancellation of admission, FIR under IPC for severe ragging cases

student_governance.name: Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) / POSH Committee
student_governance.overview: Handles complaints of sexual harassment on campus as per Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Act 2013.
student_governance.contact: Contact ICC/POSH committee through college administration or women's cell
student_governance.confidentiality: All complaints are treated with strict confidentiality

major_annual_events.name: Freshers' Party / Orientation
major_annual_events.description: Welcome event for new students organized by senior students. Cultural performances, fun games, Fresher of the Year contest.

major_annual_events.name: Cultural Fest (Annual College Fest)
major_annual_events.description: Multi-day mega event with competitions in music, dance, drama, fine arts, literary events, sports. Inter-college participation. Pro-nights with celebrity performances in large colleges.

major_annual_events.name: Technical Fest / Techno-fest
major_annual_events.description: Technical competitions: robotics, coding, paper presentation, project expo, hackathon, quizzes. Industry talks and workshops.

major_annual_events.name: Sports Meet / Annual Athletic Meet
major_annual_events.description: College-wide sports competition across cricket, football, athletics, badminton, chess, indoor games. Inter-departmental and inter-year competitions.

major_annual_events.name: Industry Visit / Educational Tour
major_annual_events.timing: During semester as part of curriculum
major_annual_events.description: Department-organized visits to industry, research centers, historical sites. Mandatory attendance; enhances practical learning.

major_annual_events.name: Convocation
major_annual_events.description: Annual ceremony for conferring degrees to outgoing batch. Chief guest from industry or government. Gold medals awarded for academic excellence.

major_annual_events.name: Republic Day / Independence Day Celebrations
major_annual_events.description: Flag hoisting, cultural programs, march past, speeches. Attendance often mandatory for students.

major_annual_events.name: Annual Day / College Foundation Day
major_annual_events.description: Celebration of college founding. Cultural performances, award distribution, alumni meet.
